name: Lily Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Lily Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells organic pigments in the People's Republic of China. It offers pigment for inks, coatings, pearlescent, and plastics; and coating and plastic color cards. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China. Lily Group Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Lily Holding Co., Ltd.
